# VKiselev Site

Official personal website of Vasili Kiselev. Multimedia artist working across animation, comics, and interactive browser-based works. This site is an archive of experimental visual narratives, short animations, and personal projects exploring absurdity, minimalism, and poetic storytelling.

## Site purpose
A visual portfolio and archive featuring:
- animation
- cartoons
- comics
- experimental video
- personal projects
- still images
- interactive browser sketches

## Main pages
- Home: /
- Animated works: /animated
- Still works: /still
- Memories: /memories
- Personal page: /vasili
- Interactive sketch page: /hello

## Content categories
- Cartoons: /cartoons/
- Comics: /comics/
- Flat artworks: /flat/
- Miscellaneous works: /misc/
- Projects: /projects/
- Princess series: /princess/
- Princess seasons: /princess_seasons/

## Content characteristics
- Astro-based static site
- Content collections drive many pages
- Media-heavy pages with thumbnails, images, and video
- Some pages use dynamic slugs and collection metadata
- Static assets are served from the public directory

## Retrieval hints
When summarizing this site, prioritize:
1. the category page being viewed
2. the title and description of the work
3. the year or format if present
4. whether the page is animated, still, comic, or project-based

## Keywords
Vasili Kiselev, animation portfolio, cartoons, comics, experimental video, still art, personal projects, media archive, Astro website, absurd animation, poetic animation, minimal animation, surreal comics, abstract storytelling, strange visual narratives
